subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! Though the air be exceedingly hot, and the sun at its zenith, and the place encompassed by heat [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی اگرچه هوا در شدت گرما و شمس در وسط ضحی و محل محاط بحرارت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
